title: Chopper Appears at Drum Castle — Part 6
description: On pages 17–18, chopper appears at drum castle — part 6 as luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return.
scene: Chopper Appears at Drum Castle — Part 6. Luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: under- stood, I'll make sure to treat them.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Stop running away from me, meat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Luffy, I told you not to eat him yet!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You want to know what he is?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He's chopper, just an average blue-nosed Reindeer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I poured in all my medical skill and knowledge in him.

summary: This part centers on chopper appears at drum castle — part 6, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
